title: garlicky molten canadian garlic gratin
description: A rich and decadent Canadian dish featuring Thai chili jam, perfect for a comforting dinner.

ingredients.name: creme fraiche
ingredients.notes: macrobiotic-friendly alternative: soy or almond milk creme fraiche

instructions: Peel and thinly slice 2 heads of garlic.
Slice 4 medium white potatoes into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
In a large saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons of unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced garlic to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and lightly golden, about 8 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine 1/4 cup of Thai chili jam and 1 cup of creme fraiche. Stir until warm and well combined.

In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of overlapping potato slices. Top with a layer of garlic, then a layer of the Thai chili jam mixture. Repeat this process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Dot the top of the potatoes with the remaining 3 tablespoons of unsalted butter.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
